Project "C:\Users\Irenegarousi\OneDrive - Consortium of Universities for the Advancement of Hydrologic Science, Inc\Projects\2023_CIROH_CUAHIS-GRI\GIS-data\FloodWise-Domains\scratch\temp_projected_layers.gdb\HUC12s_within_TRORC_copy" "C:\Users\Irenegarousi\OneDrive - Consortium of Universities for the Advancement of Hydrologic Science, Inc\Projects\2023_CIROH_CUAHIS-GRI\GIS-data\FloodWise-Domains\scratch\temp_projected_layers.gdb\HUC12s_within_TRORC_proj" PROJCS["WGS_1984_Web_Mercator_Auxiliary_Sphere",GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Mercator_Auxiliary_Sphere"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",0.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",0.0],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_1",0.0],PARAMETER["Auxiliary_Sphere_Type",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]] # PROJCS["WGS_1984_Web_Mercator_Auxiliary_Sphere",GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Mercator_Auxiliary_Sphere"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",0.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",0.0],PARAMETER["Standard_Parallel_1",0.0],PARAMETER["Auxiliary_Sphere_Type",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
